calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2006 Off Calendar

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-01-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Feb-21-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:

DAVID BUNIM, Esq. on behalf of Plaintiffs and Cross-defendants BRENDA RHODES and SUGARBEETS PRODUCTIONS, INC.
MICHAEL P. SINGSEN, Esq. on behalf of Defendants and Cross-complainants HOMEI NAIMI and O.K. INVESTMENTS, INC.

The parties reached a settlement. Terms of the settlement are as follows: Stipulation for entry of judgment and settlement agreement. Cross-defendants shall pay a total of $62,000.00 to Cross-complainants directly to Homei Naimi no later than Dec. 2, 2005 at 3:00 p.m. If payment is not received by the due date, cross-defendants will be in default and cross-complainants may seek judgment immediately without further verbal or written notice to cross-defendants. If cross-defendants have not satisfied the terms of the stipulation, cross-defendants agree to pay to cross-complainant an additional $5,000.00 as liquidated damages, plus reasonable attorneys fees and interest at statutory rate of 10% accruing from the date of entry of judgment. Upon final payment, cross-complainants shall serve and file Request for Dismissal with prejudice and return the original executed stipulation. All parties agreed to the stipulation. Stipulation signed but not filed.

Hon. Robert L. Dondero; Clerk: V.Mu; Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647 (206)
